text: ¥ CLAUDE.md 1 #* Standard Workflow 2 1. First think through the problem, read the codebase for relevant files, and write a plan to projectplan.md 3 2. The plan should have a list of todo items that you can check off as you complete them 4 3. Before you begin working, check in with me and I will verify the plan ) 4. Then, begin working on the todo items, marking them as complete as you go 3 S S CE TRV VAR 1o B0 ) R o TR YA VS i AV TR B [ R AV R EL R S T I Y 1 e changes you made 7/ 6. Make every task and code change you do as simple as possible. We want to avoid JUETS 1 To ETo AN = -5 AR Y gl ofo] )T o) KM@l = Ta Vo [TSM SAVZY o VAol - Ty (o TSR] o To VR U I 1 o - Yol = F-R 6 B o ol W oo o [} as possible. Everything is about simplicity 8 7. Finally, add a review section to the projectplan.md file with a summary of the changes you made and any other relevant information
